Class ProductBLL

java.lang.Object
businessLayer.ProductBLL
public class ProductBLL extends Object
ProductBLL contains methods to add, delete, and update products.

    • deleteProduct

      public boolean deleteProduct(String input)
      Deletes a product from the DB by its id.
      Parameters:
      input - : thi product id
      Returns:
      true in case the deletion was successful, false otherwise

    • updateProduct

      public boolean updateProduct(String id, int select, String input)
      Updates a product in the database with a given id.
      Parameters:
      id -
      select - : decides which parameter gets updated
      input - : the new value
      Returns:
      true in case of success, false otherwise.

    • decrementStock

      public void decrementStock(View view, int[] quantity)
      After an order has been successfully placed, stocks get decremented.
      Parameters:
      view - : to access the products
      quantity - : the value the stocks need to be decremented
